notes: Versioned category register (design note §3 step 7). Every boundary change is a new register_version. v0.2.0: expanded from 1 to 10 categories grounded in the segment-42 spend profiling (data/profiling_m0_seg42.csv); the sonda group is split into foley / nasogastrica / aspiracion per the schema-coherence test of the design's worked example. include/exclude are the Tier-1 classifier: regexes over NORMALIZED text (lowercase, accent-stripped, digit/letter boundaries spaced). Exclusions resolve sibling overlaps deterministically (aguja inside a jeringa description is an attribute, not a category — design §3). A category must reach >=95% precision on a ~200-description hand-checked sample before status becomes 'launched'; all entries are drafts/candidates until then. Each category carries corpus_regex: the raw-text filter used to fetch its sample corpus for the schema strawman (generate-schemas). v-merge: bandas_molares_ortodoncia merged into bandas_molares (same family found via two head tokens; design §3 step 4: identical schemas -> merge). v-removal: sistemas_succion_cerrada unregistered (corpus_regex yields 2 descriptions; below the 5-sample strawman minimum). v-fix: includes tightened to exact singular/plural for fresas/canulas/agujas (suffix wildcard captured fresado/canulado/agujero - false categories).
